Event: Cashback June 2026
Event Date: 16/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: T231
Breath of Noon Totem

Once in a while, the unit reduces the spell power of 3 random enemy units (preferred target: mage) by 45% for 4 sec. The unit also deals pure damage equal to 25% of the targets' maximum health to the targets.
This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The unit also casts electric pulse upon the targets for 4 sec.
Every time a unit affected with electric pulse uses an ability, a lightning bolt hits it, dealing 236250 magic damage to it and to all enemy units in a small radius. All affected enemy units are also stunned for 1 sec. The physical and magic damage of the ability's primary target are reduced by 10% for 4 sec. as well, and the target receives 196875 magic damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90
